title: AxoChaos: Axolotl RPG
description: Discover axolotls as masters of magic and elements. From ancient trades to legendary artifacts, explore a world that will flip your perception of these creatures upside down.
body:
![axoChaos](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f6a9245b0aaed09ea07fe644cea1269990155311.png)

---

**AxoChaos** transforms Axolotls from simple pets into masters of ancient magic. Explore the Lush Caves, trade with the mysterious Axolotl Merchant, and tame powerful mages to protect you. Beyond the cuteness lies the durability of Ancient Obsidian and the secrets of the massive Axolotl Acropolis. Complete unique quests, uncover hidden lore in 20+ structures, and discover the true strength of this ancient race.

Starting from version **2.12.0+**, the mod now officially supports [Curios API](https://modrinth.com/mod/curios). You can now equip your artifacts in dedicated slots!

---

## Featuring:

<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- 14 randomly generated structures
- 2 Epic Bosses
- Over 14 new weapons and artifacts
- Over 40 decorative blocks and building materials
- 38 Advancements tied to Custom Merchant Quests
- Lush Caves Overhaul (new flora, mobs, and mini-dungeons)
- 8 new consumable food items
- Unique materials like Treezalea Petal, Ancient Guardian Eye, and Axo Essence
- Native compatibility with JEI and Better Combat (1.9.0+)
- And much more!

</details>



---

## FAQ:


<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

**Q: Can I include AxoChaos in my modpack?**
> **A:** Yes! You are free to use this mod in any modpack. All I ask is that you provide a link back to this page and do not claim the mod as your own.

**Q: Where should I report bugs or suggest ideas?**
> **A:** Please leave your feedback in the **Comments** section on my [Curseforge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/axochaos) page, or write a comment on my [YouTube](https://www.youtube.com/@FimeFireMods) channel! I read everything. If you have a bug or a cool idea for a structure/mob, feel free to share it there.

**Q: Will you backport the mod to older versions (1.20.1, 1.18.2, etc.)?**
> **A:** No. AxoChaos will not be backported to older versions. My current plan is to focus on making the mod as high-quality and stable as possible.

**Q: What about Fabric or other mod loaders?**
> **A:** The mod is exclusively developed for **NeoForge 1.21.1**. A port to other loaders is not planned for the near future.

**Q: How can I support the development?**
> **A:** If you want to support me, just download the mod, play it, and share it with your friends! But if you wish to support me financially, you can click the **Donate** button on the left side of the page. Thank you so much!

</details>



---
